name: FPE- Prank gone wrong...
description:
"Moments before the tragedy..."

Hey guys! Notepad here... So um... Recently i watched the Fpe The Smile Parasite Au part 2, and there was a scene where Edward poured what he thought water at Engel, but in reality... It was his chemicals or acid or something... And to me... I was amazed when i saw that and decided... Why not make a bot about it?

So yeah... Enjoy i guess?
